mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_name AS ruleName, attendance_days AS attendanceDays, attendance_threshold AS attendanceThreshold, purchase_days AS purchaseDays, purchase_threshold AS purchaseThreshold FROM pt_group_to_private_rule WHERE status = 1

SELECT s.studentId AS memberId, MAX(s.storeId) AS storeId, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM stu_teamclass_ship s WHERE s.classStatus = 1 AND s.createdDate >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY s.studentId HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{threshold}

SELECT o.userId AS memberId, MAX(o.storeId) AS storeId, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM team_class_order o WHERE o.payTime IS NOT NULL AND o.payTime >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY o.userId HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{threshold}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_group_to_private_lead (member_id, store_id, rule_id, attendance_count, purchase_count, intention_reason, experience_coupon_status, follow_status) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{storeId}, #{ruleId}, #{attendanceCount}, #{purchaseCount}, #{intentionReason}, 0, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE store_id = VALUES(store_id), rule_id = VALUES(rule_id), attendance_count = VALUES(attendance_count), purchase_count = VALUES(purchase_count), intention_reason = VALUES(intention_reason)
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM pt_group_to_private_lead WHERE member_id = #{value} AND follow_status < 2 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE pt_group_to_private_lead SET follow_status = 2, last_follow_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{value} AND follow_status < 2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_group_to_private_follow (lead_id, member_id, follow_status, follow_remark, operator_id) VALUES (#{leadId}, #{memberId}, 2, '购买私教商品自动转化', NULL)
